title: SpaceX: New Street Research sees 22% upside from proposed IPO price
full_text: Investing.com -- New Street Research has initiated coverage of SpaceX with a 12-month price target of $165, representing 22% upside from the proposed IPO price and corresponding to a $2.3 trillion equity value following the company's potential acquisition of Cursor.
summary: Investing.com -- New Street Research has initiated coverage of SpaceX with a 12-month price target of $165, representing 22% upside from the proposed IPO price and corresponding to a $2.3 trillion equity value following the company's potential acquisition of Cursor.
